svg.title: Touch Traversal system architecture
svg.desc: Fictional sample notes build four checked-in static artifacts. Explicitly selected personal notes can instead cross authenticated loopback into a temporary Python companion and return as an in-memory session. The browser validates either bundle, renders one Graphology model, and accepts mouse, keyboard, or optional local hand input. An explicit local compositor can create a downloadable silent recording.
